title: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5: Security and Privacy Controls for Information Systems and Organizations - IR-3
authors: National Institute of Standards and Technology
abstract_text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 provides a catalog of security and privacy controls for information systems and organizations.

sections.title: IR-3 source section
sections.text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 places control IR-3 in the Incident Response family. The control title for IR-3 is Incident Response Testing. This source section is limited to the named control, its family, and its title for deterministic hard-recall benchmarking.

sections.title: AT-1 distractor section
sections.text: A separate nearby control, AT-1, belongs to the Awareness and Training family and is titled Awareness and Training Policy and Procedures. It is included only as a distractor section for context packing.
